subcodes.first_line: O 'Akbar! The Lord of Destiny maketh mention of thee from the Most Great Horizon with verses whereunto the world and whatsoever hath been ordained therein cannot compare. Rejoice thou at this gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اکبر مالک القدر یذکرک فی المنظر الاکبر بآیات لایعادلها العالم و ما قدر فیه افرح بهذا الفرح
